commit_message_summary: feat(rpc): real term-overlap ranking for SearchCandidates (issue #21, 4.2.1)

key_pointers_for_verifier.modified_handler: engine/rpc/server.go: SearchCandidates func (search for 'func (s *Server) SearchCandidates') -- doc comment updated in place, rank-then-cap ordering, prefixTerm(req.GetQuery()) now passed to btree.PrefixScan instead of the raw query string
key_pointers_for_verifier.removed_dead_code: engine/rpc/server.go: const searchCandidateScore float32 = 1.0 and its doc comment, removed (superseded by real scoring)
key_pointers_for_verifier.new_test_file: engine/rpc/search_candidates_test.go: TestSearchCandidates with 4 subtests -- RanksByTermOverlap, DivergesFromLexicographicOrder, EmptyQueryPreservesPrefixScanOrder, MaxResultsCapsRankedList
key_pointers_for_verifier.design_deviation_disclosed: server.go now passes only req.Query's first whitespace-separated token to btree.PrefixScan (new prefixTerm helper), not the full query string, so multi-term queries can meaningfully rank; full query string still drives ranking. See self-consistency.json's known_design_deviation_disclosed field and search_candidates.go's/server.go's doc comments for full rationale. Confirmed zero behavior change for every pre-existing caller (all have no interior whitespace in their query strings).

test_result: go test ./engine/rpc/... -run TestSearchCandidates -v -count=1 -> PASS 4/4 subtests; go test ./engine/rpc/... -run 'TestRPCServerHandlers|TestRPCIntegration|TestSearchCandidates' -v -count=1 -> PASS, zero regressions in pre-existing SearchCandidates subtests; go test ./engine/... -> PASS across all packages (engine, btree, catalog, graph, mvcc, rpc, split, wal)
lint_result: go vet ./engine/... -> clean, no output; gofmt -l engine/rpc/*.go -> no output (all formatted)
not_in_scope_next_dispatches: No further subtasks under issue #21 were specified in this dispatch; check gh issue view 21 for any additional subtasks under milestone #6 Phase 4 not covered by 4.2.1.
self_verification_note: Per invariant I4, this run did not verify its own work. /cdr:verify must run independently before any push or issue/milestone state change.
